3 June 2024

Predicting what's next

The life without internet is _____

You can fill this sentence up with words like boring, blissful or satisfying. But, how does a language model like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini do it ? This question forms the basis of language modeling, an exciting area of research in natural language processing. To understand this

Key Improvements from Llama 1

The most notable improvements in Llama 2 include: - Enhanced context window - Refined pre-training methodology - Improved instruction following capabilities

Architecture Deep Dive

Model Sizes and Parameters

Llama 2 comes in several sizes: - 7B parameters - 13B parameters - 70B parameters Each size offers different trade-offs between performance and computational requirements.

Training Methodology

The training process involved: 1. Pre-training on a massive dataset 2. Fine-tuning with instruction following 3. RLHF (Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback)

Performance Analysis

[Include detailed performance metrics and comparisons]

Implications for the AI Community

The release of Llama 2 has several implications: - Increased accessibility to high-quality language models - New opportunities for research and development - Potential impact on commercial AI applications

Conclusion

[Summarize key takeaways and future outlook]
